title: Meidrim Road Section
summary: Meidrim Road Section is a road cut that shows the geology of the Llanvirn-Caradoc age. It is a Site of Special Scientific Interest in Carmarthen & Dinefwr,  Wales.
text: Meidrim Road Section is a road cut that shows the geology of the Llanvirn-Caradoc age. It is a Site of Special Scientific Interest in Carmarthen & Dinefwr,  Wales.
